color-space.name: Color Space
color-space.description:
HSV/HSL are common color spaces but not very perceptually accurate (for example, a full saturation yellow and deep blue are considered the same brightness, even though we obviously perceive yellow as brighter)

OkHSV/OkHSL attempt to be more perceptually accurate

affect-slider.name: S and V/L affects slider
affect-slider.description: The saturation and value/lightness will affect the slider colors
